## htsjdk.samtools.metrics.StringHeader
# CollectHsMetrics BAIT_INTERVALS=[/scratch/hsMetrics/cc146db9-c61e-4a80-8fc0-a13211f8e171/call-collectHSmetrics/inputs/38239782/S07604715_Regions_sorted.interval_list] TARGET_INTERVALS=[/scratch/hsMetrics/cc146db9-c61e-4a80-8fc0-a13211f8e171/call-collectHSmetrics/inputs/-468803425/S07604715_Regions_sorted.interval_list] INPUT=/scratch/hsMetrics/cc146db9-c61e-4a80-8fc0-a13211f8e171/call-collectHSmetrics/inputs/436281278/TEST_0001.filter.deduped.realigned.recalibrated.bam OUTPUT=TEST_0001.HS.txt COVERAGE_CAP=500 TMP_DIR=[picardTmp] VALIDATION_STRINGENCY=LENIENT REFERENCE_SEQUENCE=/modules/sw/data/hg19-p13/hg19_random.fa    METRIC_ACCUMULATION_LEVEL=[ALL_READS] NEAR_DISTANCE=250 MINIMUM_MAPPING_QUALITY=20 MINIMUM_BASE_QUALITY=20 CLIP_OVERLAPPING_READS=true INCLUDE_INDELS=false SAMPLE_SIZE=10000 ALLELE_FRACTION=[0.001, 0.005, 0.01, 0.02, 0.05, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5] VERBOSITY=INFO QUIET=false COMPRESSION_LEVEL=5 MAX_RECORDS_IN_RAM=500000 CREATE_INDEX=false CREATE_MD5_FILE=false GA4GH_CLIENT_SECRETS=client_secrets.json USE_JDK_DEFLATER=false USE_JDK_INFLATER=false
